summary: Successfully froze governance P0+ patches: canonical guards, evidence gate, global FAIL/BLOCK rules, round patch mapping (14 groups), formula governance, legal priority correction, R070 mapping correction.

canonical_guards.pre_commit: Blocks single-parent commits to canonical (main, work/canonical-*). Allows merge commits. Exceptions: signed merge, signed rollback, force-with-lease with authorization.
canonical_guards.pre_push: Blocks unauthorized pushes to canonical. Allows merge commits (2+ parents). Exceptions: signed merge, signed rollback, force-with-lease with authorization.

evidence_gate.checks: task.txt, evidence.json, report.json, candidate.diff, test-results.txt, no-aider-used.txt (if no aider.log)

rules: Rule 2: uncalibrated confidence => BLOCK trading approval
Rule 3: survivor-only universe / PRI-TRI mix / inconsistency => NO upgrade
Rule 5: expected vs actual fill/slippage deviation => MUST downgrade or recalibrate
Rule 6: regime uncertainty too high => reduce-size / wait-confirmation / no-trade only
Rule 7: island-type optimal parameters without plateau/stability => mark overfit, NO upgrade
global_fail_rules.mapping: Rules mapped to affected rounds in round_patch_mapping.md

formula_patches: net_edge = p̂ * Ŵ - (1-p̂) * L̂ - C - S - B - T
qty = min(trade_budget/risk_unit, adv_cap, exposure_cap, margin_cap, regime_cap)
regime uncertainty: entropy or equivalent metric <= threshold
release conditions: net_edge>0, fill_prob>=threshold, regime_uncertainty<=threshold, no veto, market reality pass, risk final gate pass

legal_priority.notes: Law 04 is enhancement, not replacement for 02/03. 0416 integration gap acknowledged.

r070_mapping.removed: idle auto-shutdown as core substitute for portfolio risk
